title: T6 Constellation: Migrate sentinel 'a'→'e' — cut launchd + MCP to the re-scaffold, retire the typo'd repo
prompt: The fleet collector feeding all liveness data runs from the legacy typo'd repo ~/dev/ad/apps/appyradar-sentinal ('a': launchd daemon com.appydave.appyradar-sentinal runs src/main.ts; the global MCP server NAMED appyradar-sentinel serves from the 'a' PATH src/access/bindings/mcp.ts; 113 files dirty). The clean re-scaffold ~/dev/ad/apps/appyradar-sentinel ('e', 2 commits, built on published @appydave/appysentinel-core@0.1.0) has never been installed, configured, or run — and it is a NEW lineage, never a git continuation of 'a'. Migrate collection to 'e' and retire 'a': bun install + tests in 'e'; create sentinel.config.json from the example (fix appsJsonPath, keep the 5-machine fleet verbatim, do NOT touch Roamy hostnames — blind-to-Roamy is T6-03); copy the ~70 dated snapshots across (never sentinel-latest.json, never re-parse old schema); foreground smoke-run the collector (fresh parseable sentinel-latest.json, partial fleet OK) and stdio-handshake the MCP (tools/list shows fleet_status + refresh); cut the user-scope MCP registration to 'e' src/expose/mcp.ts via claude mcp remove/add; bootout the 'a' launchd agent, archive its plist into the 'a' repo, bootstrap com.appydave.appyradar-sentinel pointing at 'e' (roll back to 'a' if 'e' won't stay up); retire 'a' in place — secrets-scan the dirty tree, RETIRED banner atop README, commit + push, NEVER delete the folder or appyradar-sentinal-safe; register 'e' in ~/.config/appydave/locations.json (backup first) and update dark-factory docs/constellation-map.md sentinel rows, then commit + push dark-factory. Never kill lingering session-owned 'a' mcp.ts processes; no source changes to 'e' beyond config; 'e' exposes 9 MCP tools vs 'a''s 13 — abort to needs-decision if recon finds a runtime consumer of the removed six. Read and execute the war game at backlog/wargames/T6-02-sentinel-migration.md. Follow its moves in order; on any failure signal apply the counter-move; on any abort condition stop and write needs-decision/.
verify: launchctl list | grep appyradar shows exactly one loaded agent, com.appydave.appyradar-sentinel, with a numeric PID, and ~/Library/LaunchAgents contains only the 'e' plist; ps shows no process running appyradar-sentinal/src/main.ts (lingering session-owned mcp.ts stdio servers are allowed); /Users/davidcruwys/dev/ad/apps/appyradar-sentinel/snapshots/sentinel-latest.json exists, parses as JSON, and has an mtime within ~10 minutes of a pulse; claude mcp get appyradar-sentinel resolves to appyradar-sentinel/src/expose/mcp.ts; the legacy repo /Users/davidcruwys/dev/ad/apps/appyradar-sentinal has a clean git status, a RETIRED banner as README line 1, its old plist archived under docs/retired-launchd/, and the retirement commit pushed (or 'push pending' recorded in the done summary); locations.json parses and contains key appyradar-sentinel; dark-factory docs/constellation-map.md contains 'RETIRED 2026-07-06' and no longer calls the 'a' repo RUNNING, committed and pushed. Negative: appyradar-sentinal and appyradar-sentinal-safe folders both still exist; the 'a' repo's snapshots/ still holds >=70 files; the supportsignal-sentinel MCP entry in ~/.claude.json is untouched; app-registry/store/registry.json was not hand-edited.
